prompt:
TRUE chunky pixel art sprite ONLY. Canvas is exactly 32 logical columns by 48 logical rows, rendered at 1024×1536. Every logical pixel is one uniform 32×32 square aligned to the grid.

Draw one SMALL, COMPACT, full-body chibi Hunter in strict side profile facing RIGHT. The complete non-magenta silhouette—including hood, scarf, bow, bowstring, arrow, quiver, boots, and outline—must fit inside a centered box no larger than 24 logical cells wide × 34 logical cells tall.

Leave at least 7 completely empty magenta rows in total above and below the Hunter, with at least 3 empty rows on each side. Leave at least 4 empty magenta columns on both left and right. Do not use the clearance area for equipment or clothing.

Compact pose: knees slightly bent, head lowered, feet close together. Hold a short, tightly curved bow diagonally across the torso. Keep the entire bow, arrow, scarf, and quiver inside the body's vertical extent. No raised arms, tall ears, upright bow, trailing clothing, or projecting equipment.

Fitted mint-green stitched tunic, small leaf-scale shoulder, plum hood resting tightly against the back, very short berry-pink scarf tail, cream trousers, short boots, dark-plum one-cell outline. Use 10–12 flat colors. Every unused cell is flat #ff00ff.

No gradients, anti-aliasing, dithering, shadows, floor, glow, particles, text, watermark, transparency, cropped equipment, or hot magenta inside the Hunter.
